Bus Timings

105 Bus Route and Schedule from Mall Of Emirates to Miracle Garden

January 11, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai’s public transport is famed for being efficient and spread far and wide, linking the city’s main districts. RTA Bus 105 is important, as it connects the Mall of the Emirates to Miracle Garden. It is a crucial link between a big shopping center and one of Dubai’s top tourist destinations. In this article we will discuss the operational schedule, the key stops of Bus 105 and other relative facts. We want you to enjoy a smooth and comfortable journey.

Contents

Operational Details

Bus 105 runs all day from early until late. The schedule for departures from Mall of the Emirates and Miracle Garden is as follows:

From Mall of the Emirates Bus Station From Miracle Garden
09:37 10:10
10:07 10:40
10:37 11:10
11:07 11:40
11:37 12:10
12:07 12:40
12:37 13:10
13:07 13:40
13:37 14:10
14:07 14:40
14:37 15:10
15:00 15:40
15:30 16:10
16:00 16:40
16:30 17:10
17:00 17:40
17:30 18:10
18:00 18:40
18:30 19:10
19:00 19:40
19:30 20:10
20:00 20:40
20:30 21:10

Bus 105 TimetableTicket Pricing: Dubai’s unified payment system for public transportation is Nol Card, which accepts payment by the RTA Bus 105. The AED 3 is for a single trip in one zone. For added convenience, passengers can top up their Nol Cards online, at counters at metro stations or at dedicated kiosks throughout the city.

Route Overview

Bus 105 is a good connecting bus, which connects all the main places, for both tourists and residents. Here’s a list of key stops along the route:

  1. Mall of the Emirates Bus Station One of Dubai’s premier shopping centers with access to the Metro and other transportation options.

  2. Miracle Garden A world-famous flower garden featuring over 150 million blooming flowers, making it a must-see attraction.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

It takes in some of Dubai’s most renowned areas and offers easy access to the key attractions of Dubai, residential areas and commercial zones.

Attractions and Landmarks Nearby

Riding the Bus 105 offers access to several of Dubai’s major attractions:

  1. Miracle Garden The world’s largest natural flower garden, featuring vibrant displays and seasonal exhibitions.

  2. Mall of the Emirates A premier shopping mall with luxury stores, Ski Dubai, and a wide array of dining options.

3.

Journey Experience

The Mall of the Emirates of Miracle Garden can be easily reached by a smooth and comfortable ride on RTA bus 105. Some of Dubai’s districts are immortalised in unforgettable experiences, where towering skyscrapers, magnetic shopping districts, and lush green spaces are of no exception. Passengers on the bus could see the stunning floral displays at Miracle Garden approaching and some would have had a buzz of anticipation at their impending visit.

The bus route turned out to be a great stress free way to travel, with little parking hassle and let passengers enjoy the city sights.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: January 11, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
